strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) plus recent AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic tooling
Strong engineering-culture contributions: TDD advocacy, open-source libraries, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at platform scale, which the role centers on
Career level is senior/staff IC; no evidence of Director-level scope, strategy work, or advising executive customers
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited depth in cloud platform architecture beyond application-level AWS use

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Gap between staff-level IC experience and Director-level strategy scope
Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial background

response.justification: The candidate comfortably meets the tenure requirement and shows genuine breadth, craftsmanship, and entrepreneurial initiative, with early-stage exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, this Principal/Director-level role demands recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI platforms or products, and strategic influence with customers and executives — areas where the resume shows only recent, junior-scoped involvement. He is a strong senior/staff engineer but not a fit for an AI strategy principal role.
